name: quantumswap-browser-extension
description: Self-custody QuantumCoin wallet with token swaps, dApp connectivity, and quantum-resistant security.
author: QuantumSwap Community

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:bridge && wxt build && wxt build -b firefox
scripts.build:chrome: npm run typecheck && npm run build:bridge && wxt build
scripts.build:firefox: npm run typecheck && npm run build:bridge && wxt build -b firefox
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:bridge && wxt zip -b firefox
